---
title: "Parties and Change in Post-bailout Cyprus: The May 2016 Parliamentary Elections"
author: "Triga, V."
date: 2017-01-01
description: "Southern European Society and Politics"
doi: "10.1080/13608746.2017.1312768"
categories: [Applied Political Communication]
image: images_publications/journal-article.png
---

**Link:** [https://doi.org/10.1080/13608746.2017.1312768](https://doi.org/10.1080/13608746.2017.1312768)
